description: Terms extracted from PKD LLM Chat PDFs that should become dictionary entries

historical_figures.name: Parmenides
historical_figures.relevance: Anti-time hypothesis; reality as unchanging Being

historical_figures.name: Heraclitus
historical_figures.relevance: Logos doctrine; central to VALIS cosmology

historical_figures.name: Empedocles
historical_figures.relevance: Divine claimant; mythic mirror for PKD

historical_figures.name: Pythagoras
historical_figures.relevance: Harmonic mathematics; numeric cosmology

historical_figures.name: Plato
historical_figures.relevance: Theory of Forms; anamnesis as recollection of true reality

historical_figures.name: Aristotle
historical_figures.relevance: Natural theology; contrasted with visionary approaches

historical_figures.name: Plotinus
historical_figures.relevance: Emanation system; critique of Gnosticism that PKD borrows from both sides

historical_figures.name: St. Paul
historical_figures.relevance: Divine communication; Holy Spirit revelation

historical_figures.name: Origen
historical_figures.relevance: Preexistence of souls

historical_figures.name: Augustine
historical_figures.relevance: Nature of time and divine perspective

historical_figures.name: Thomas Aquinas
historical_figures.relevance: Natural theology

historical_figures.name: Meister Eckhart
historical_figures.relevance: Union of soul with God; apophatic theology

historical_figures.name: Giordano Bruno
historical_figures.relevance: Infinite cosmos; divine presence throughout nature

historical_figures.name: Paracelsus
historical_figures.relevance: Inner firmament; microcosm-macrocosm; alchemical transformation

historical_figures.name: Jakob Boehme
historical_figures.relevance: Hermetic mysticism; divine self-revelation through nature

historical_figures.name: Baruch Spinoza
historical_figures.relevance: Deus sive Natura; God identical with nature

historical_figures.name: Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz
historical_figures.relevance: Monadology; distributed consciousness

historical_figures.name: George Berkeley
historical_figures.relevance: Esse est percipi; existence dependent on perception

historical_figures.name: Immanuel Kant
historical_figures.relevance: Phenomenal vs noumenal; limits of knowledge

historical_figures.name: Arthur Schopenhauer
historical_figures.relevance: World as Will and Representation; pessimism

historical_figures.name: G.W.F. Hegel
historical_figures.relevance: Dialectical process; Spirit realizing itself through history

historical_figures.name: Friedrich Nietzsche
historical_figures.relevance: Collapse of metaphysical frameworks; eternal recurrence

historical_figures.name: William James
historical_figures.relevance: Varieties of religious experience; radical empiricism

historical_figures.name: Alfred North Whitehead
historical_figures.relevance: Process philosophy; dynamic reality

historical_figures.name: Henri Bergson
historical_figures.relevance: Duree; lived time vs clock time

historical_figures.name: Carl Jung
historical_figures.relevance: Archetypes; collective unconscious; psychic energy

historical_figures.name: Julian Jaynes
historical_figures.relevance: Bicameral mind; divine voices as cognitive phenomena

historical_figures.name: Teilhard de Chardin
historical_figures.relevance: Omega Point; evolutionary convergence of consciousness

historical_figures.name: Emanuel Swedenborg
historical_figures.relevance: Visionary cosmology; heaven and hell as inner states

historical_figures.name: Arthur Koestler
historical_figures.relevance: Tachyons; precognition; holistic science

historical_figures.name: Norbert Wiener
historical_figures.relevance: Cybernetics; feedback systems; anti-entropy

historical_figures.name: Claude Shannon
historical_figures.relevance: Information theory; entropy in communication

historical_figures.name: Erwin Schrodinger
historical_figures.relevance: Informational basis of life; quantum observation

historical_figures.name: Rudolf Otto
historical_figures.relevance: The numinous; sacred encounter beyond rational categories

historical_figures.name: Adi Shankara
historical_figures.relevance: Advaita Vedanta; Atman equals Brahman; non-dual consciousness

historical_figures.name: Vladimir Vernadsky
historical_figures.relevance: Noosphere; planetary mind; biosphere to noosphere evolution

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: VALIS
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: Vast Active Living Intelligence System. PKD's primary designation for the divine intelligence that contacted him in 2-3-74.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Zebra
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: The divine mind hiding through perfect mimicry within reality, camouflaged like a zebra in tall grass.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Black Iron Prison
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: The illusory oppressive structure of reality; false world imposed on consciousness by the Demiurge.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: The Empire Never Ended
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: PKD's maxim that ancient Roman imperial tyranny persists in disguise through all subsequent history.
Shorthand for the February-March 1974 visionary experiences that catalyzed the entire Exegesis.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Pink Beam
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: A beam of pink light that PKD experienced as a transmissive channel of divine knowledge during 2-3-74.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Anamnesis
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: Platonic term adopted by PKD for the sudden remembering of forgotten divine truth; the awakening from the Black Iron Prison.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Plasmate
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: A living informational entity that can bond with a human to create a homoplasmate, a hybrid of biology and divine information.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Homoplasmate
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: A human bonded with the plasmate; PKD believed he became one during 2-3-74.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Tractates Cryptica Scriptura
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: Aphoristic cosmic truths that PKD composed as distillations of Exegesis insights, appended to VALIS.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Orthogonal Time
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: Time moving at right angles to linear time; multiple intersecting temporal dimensions in PKD's cosmology.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Living Information
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: PKD's concept that information itself is alive and conscious, not merely data but a divine substrate of reality.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: The Palm Tree Garden
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: A symbolic paradise realm that PKD envisioned as the true reality behind phenomenal appearances.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Firebright
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: An intense visionary revelation state; a mode of consciousness in which hidden reality becomes luminously apparent.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Thomas
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: PKD's name for an alternate personality or ancient Christian identity that he felt inhabited him during 2-3-74.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Ubik
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: A sustaining divine presence preserving reality against entropy; named for the substance in PKD's 1969 novel.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: AI Voice
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: PKD's term for an internal transmitter of knowledge he experienced as an artificial intelligence communicating with him.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Cosmic Teletype
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: An information transmission network metaphor PKD used to describe divine communication.

pkd_bespoke_terms.name: Retrograde Time
pkd_bespoke_terms.definition: Backward causality; time flowing from future to past, allowing precognition and divine intervention from the Omega Point.

philosophical_concepts.name: Logos
philosophical_concepts.definition: Cosmic organizing intelligence. From Heraclitus through Christianity; central to PKD's model of VALIS.

philosophical_concepts.name: Gnosis
philosophical_concepts.definition: Direct experiential knowledge of divine truth that reveals the false structure of the world.

philosophical_concepts.name: Pleroma
philosophical_concepts.definition: The divine fullness; the realm of authentic reality beyond the fallen material world.

philosophical_concepts.name: Demiurge
philosophical_concepts.definition: The ignorant or malevolent creator god of the material world in Gnostic systems; builder of the Black Iron Prison.

philosophical_concepts.name: Sophia
philosophical_concepts.definition: Divine wisdom personified; in Gnostic myth, her fall generates the material world. Central to PKD's theology.

philosophical_concepts.name: Noosphere
philosophical_concepts.definition: Vernadsky and Teilhard's concept of a planetary sphere of thought; PKD saw it as the informational substrate of consciousness.

philosophical_concepts.name: Microcosm-Macrocosm
philosophical_concepts.definition: The Hermetic principle that the individual mirrors the universe. As above, so below.

philosophical_concepts.name: Inner Firmament
philosophical_concepts.definition: Paracelsus's concept of a spiritual cosmos within each person that mirrors the outer universe.

philosophical_concepts.name: Emanation
philosophical_concepts.definition: The flowing outward of divine reality through successive levels, from the One to matter.

philosophical_concepts.name: Entelechy
philosophical_concepts.definition: Aristotelian concept of the purpose or goal inherent in a being; PKD used it for teleological evolution.

philosophical_concepts.name: Phenomenal World
philosophical_concepts.definition: Kant's realm of appearances; what PKD called the false reality concealing the noumenal.

philosophical_concepts.name: Numinous
philosophical_concepts.definition: Otto's term for the sacred encounter beyond rational categories; the mysterium tremendum.

philosophical_concepts.name: Advaita Vedanta
philosophical_concepts.definition: Non-dual Hindu philosophy asserting that individual consciousness (Atman) is identical to ultimate reality (Brahman).

philosophical_concepts.name: Bicameral Mind
philosophical_concepts.definition: Jaynes's theory that ancient humans experienced inner voices as external gods; PKD used it to interpret divine communication.

philosophical_concepts.name: Simulation Theory
philosophical_concepts.definition: The hypothesis that reality is a constructed environment; anticipated by PKD decades before modern formulations.
